text: Did you know some species can carry the weight of entire ecosystems? These are flagship species—charismatic animals that symbolize conservation efforts. Think of lions, pandas, or sea turtles. Their survival impacts countless others. Research shows that protecting these species can help entire ecosystems thrive. But here's the twist—conservation isn’t just about them. It’s about all of us. Want to dive deeper into our planet's mysteries? Hit follow and join the journey!
